1: package docker
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"fmt"
5: 
6: 	"github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/config/label"
7: )
8: 
9: const (
10: 	labelDockerComposeProject = "com.docker.compose.project"
11: 	labelDockerComposeService = "com.docker.compose.service"
12: )
13: 
14: // configuration Contains information from the labels that are globals (not related to the dynamic configuration)
15: // or specific to the provider.
16: type configuration struct {
17: 	Enable bool
18: 	Docker specificConfiguration
19: }
20: 
21: type specificConfiguration struct {
22: 	Network string
23: 	LBSwarm bool
24: }
25: 
26: func (p *Shared) extractLabels(container dockerData) (configuration, error) {
27: 	conf := configuration{
28: 		Enable: p.ExposedByDefault,
29: 		Docker: specificConfiguration{
30: 			Network: p.Network,
31: 		},
32: 	}
33: 
34: 	err := label.Decode(container.Labels, &conf, "traefik.docker.", "traefik.enable")
35: 	if err != nil {
36: 		return configuration{}, err
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	return conf, nil
40: }
41: 
42: // getStringMultipleStrict get multiple string values associated to several labels.
43: // Fail if one label is missing.
44: func getStringMultipleStrict(labels map[string]string, labelNames ...string) (map[string]string, error) {
45: 	foundLabels := map[string]string{}
46: 	for _, name := range labelNames {
47: 		value := getStringValue(labels, name, "")
48: 		// Error out only if one of them is not defined.
49: 		if len(value) == 0 {
50: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("label not found: %s", name)
51: 		}
52: 		foundLabels[name] = value
53: 	}
54: 	return foundLabels, nil
55: }
56: 
57: // getStringValue get string value associated to a label.
58: func getStringValue(labels map[string]string, labelName, defaultValue string) string {
59: 	if value, ok := labels[labelName]; ok && len(value) > 0 {
60: 		return value
61: 	}
62: 	return defaultValue
63: }

1: package docker
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"encoding/base64"
6: 	"fmt"
7: 	"net/http"
8: 	"text/template"
9: 	"time"
10: 
11: 	"github.com/docker/cli/cli/connhelper"
12: 	dockertypes "github.com/docker/docker/api/types"
13: 	"github.com/docker/docker/client"
14: 	"github.com/docker/go-connections/nat"
15: 	"github.com/docker/go-connections/sockets"
16: 	"github.com/rs/zerolog/log"
17: 	ptypes "github.com/traefik/paerser/types"
18: 	"github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/provider"
19: 	"github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/types"
20: 	"github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/version"
21: )
22: 
23: // DefaultTemplateRule The default template for the default rule.
24: const DefaultTemplateRule = "Host(`{{ normalize .Name }}`)"
25: 
26: type Shared struct {
27: 	ExposedByDefault   bool   `description:"Expose containers by default." json:"exposedByDefault,omitempty" toml:"exposedByDefault,omitempty" yaml:"exposedByDefault,omitempty" export:"true"`
28: 	Constraints        string `description:"Constraints is an expression that Traefik matches against the container's labels to determine whether to create any route for that container." json:"constraints,omitempty" toml:"constraints,omitempty" yaml:"constraints,omitempty" export:"true"`
29: 	AllowEmptyServices bool   `description:"Disregards the Docker containers health checks with respect to the creation or removal of the corresponding services." json:"allowEmptyServices,omitempty" toml:"allowEmptyServices,omitempty" yaml:"allowEmptyServices,omitempty" export:"true"`
30: 	Network            string `description:"Default Docker network used." json:"network,omitempty" toml:"network,omitempty" yaml:"network,omitempty" export:"true"`
31: 	UseBindPortIP      bool   `description:"Use the ip address from the bound port, rather than from the inner network." json:"useBindPortIP,omitempty" toml:"useBindPortIP,omitempty" yaml:"useBindPortIP,omitempty" export:"true"`
32: 
33: 	Watch       bool   `description:"Watch Docker events." json:"watch,omitempty" toml:"watch,omitempty" yaml:"watch,omitempty" export:"true"`
34: 	DefaultRule string `description:"Default rule." json:"defaultRule,omitempty" toml:"defaultRule,omitempty" yaml:"defaultRule,omitempty"`
35: 
36: 	defaultRuleTpl *template.Template
37: }
38: 
39: func inspectContainers(ctx context.Context, dockerClient client.ContainerAPIClient, containerID string) dockerData {
40: 	containerInspected, err := dockerClient.ContainerInspect(ctx, containerID)
41: 	if err != nil {
42: 		log.Ctx(ctx).Warn().Err(err).Msgf("Failed to inspect container %s", containerID)
43: 		return dockerData{}
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	// This condition is here to avoid to have empty IP https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues/2459
47: 	// We register only container which are running
48: 	if containerInspected.ContainerJSONBase != nil && containerInspected.ContainerJSONBase.State != nil && containerInspected.ContainerJSONBase.State.Running {
49: 		return parseContainer(containerInspected)
50: 	}
51: 
52: 	return dockerData{}
53: }
54: 
55: func parseContainer(container dockertypes.ContainerJSON) dockerData {
56: 	dData := dockerData{
57: 		NetworkSettings: networkSettings{},
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	if container.ContainerJSONBase != nil {
61: 		dData.ID = container.ContainerJSONBase.ID
62: 		dData.Name = container.ContainerJSONBase.Name
63: 		dData.ServiceName = dData.Name // Default ServiceName to be the container's Name.
64: 		dData.Node = container.ContainerJSONBase.Node
65: 
66: 		if container.ContainerJSONBase.HostConfig != nil {
67: 			dData.NetworkSettings.NetworkMode = container.ContainerJSONBase.HostConfig.NetworkMode
68: 		}
69: 
70: 		if container.State != nil && container.State.Health != nil {
71: 			dData.Health = container.State.Health.Status
72: 		}
73: 	}
74: 
75: 	if container.Config != nil && container.Config.Labels != nil {
76: 		dData.Labels = container.Config.Labels
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	if container.NetworkSettings != nil {
80: 		if container.NetworkSettings.Ports != nil {
81: 			dData.NetworkSettings.Ports = container.NetworkSettings.Ports
82: 		}
83: 		if container.NetworkSettings.Networks != nil {
84: 			dData.NetworkSettings.Networks = make(map[string]*networkData)
85: 			for name, containerNetwork := range container.NetworkSettings.Networks {
86: 				addr := containerNetwork.IPAddress
87: 				if addr == "" {
88: 					addr = containerNetwork.GlobalIPv6Address
89: 				}
90: 
91: 				dData.NetworkSettings.Networks[name] = &networkData{
92: 					ID:   containerNetwork.NetworkID,
93: 					Name: name,
94: 					Addr: addr,
95: 				}
96: 			}
97: 		}
98: 	}
99: 	return dData
100: }
101: 
102: type ClientConfig struct {
103: 	apiVersion string
104: 
105: 	Username          string           `description:"Username for Basic HTTP authentication." json:"username,omitempty" toml:"username,omitempty" yaml:"username,omitempty"`
106: 	Password          string           `description:"Password for Basic HTTP authentication." json:"password,omitempty" toml:"password,omitempty" yaml:"password,omitempty"`
107: 	Endpoint          string           `description:"Docker server endpoint. Can be a TCP or a Unix socket endpoint." json:"endpoint,omitempty" toml:"endpoint,omitempty" yaml:"endpoint,omitempty"`
108: 	TLS               *types.ClientTLS `description:"Enable Docker TLS support." json:"tls,omitempty" toml:"tls,omitempty" yaml:"tls,omitempty" export:"true"`
109: 	HTTPClientTimeout ptypes.Duration  `description:"Client timeout for HTTP connections." json:"httpClientTimeout,omitempty" toml:"httpClientTimeout,omitempty" yaml:"httpClientTimeout,omitempty" export:"true"`
110: }
111: 
112: func createClient(ctx context.Context, cfg ClientConfig) (*client.Client, error) {
113: 	opts, err := getClientOpts(ctx, cfg)
114: 	if err != nil {
115: 		return nil, err
116: 	}
117: 
118: 	httpHeaders := map[string]string{
119: 		"User-Agent": "Traefik " + version.Version,
120: 	}
121: 	if cfg.Username != "" && cfg.Password != "" {
122: 		httpHeaders["Authorization"] = "Basic " + base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString([]byte(cfg.Username+":"+cfg.Password))
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	opts = append(opts,
126: 		client.WithHTTPHeaders(httpHeaders),
127: 		client.WithVersion(cfg.apiVersion))
128: 
129: 	return client.NewClientWithOpts(opts...)
130: }
131: 
132: func getClientOpts(ctx context.Context, cfg ClientConfig) ([]client.Opt, error) {
133: 	helper, err := connhelper.GetConnectionHelper(cfg.Endpoint)
134: 	if err != nil {
135: 		return nil, err
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	// SSH
139: 	if helper != nil {
140: 		// https://github.com/docker/cli/blob/ebca1413117a3fcb81c89d6be226dcec74e5289f/cli/context/docker/load.go#L112-L123
141: 
142: 		httpClient := &http.Client{
143: 			Transport: &http.Transport{
144: 				DialContext: helper.Dialer,
145: 			},
146: 		}
147: 
148: 		return []client.Opt{
149: 			client.WithHTTPClient(httpClient),
150: 			client.WithTimeout(time.Duration(cfg.HTTPClientTimeout)),
151: 			client.WithHost(helper.Host), // To avoid 400 Bad Request: malformed Host header daemon error
152: 			client.WithDialContext(helper.Dialer),
153: 		}, nil
154: 	}
155: 
156: 	opts := []client.Opt{
157: 		client.WithHost(cfg.Endpoint),
158: 		client.WithTimeout(time.Duration(cfg.HTTPClientTimeout)),
159: 	}
160: 
161: 	if cfg.TLS != nil {
162: 		conf, err := cfg.TLS.CreateTLSConfig(ctx)
163: 		if err != nil {
164: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to create client TLS configuration: %w", err)
165: 		}
166: 
167: 		hostURL, err := client.ParseHostURL(cfg.Endpoint)
168: 		if err != nil {
169: 			return nil, err
170: 		}
171: 
172: 		tr := &http.Transport{
173: 			TLSClientConfig: conf,
174: 		}
175: 
176: 		if err := sockets.ConfigureTransport(tr, hostURL.Scheme, hostURL.Host); err != nil {
177: 			return nil, err
178: 		}
179: 
180: 		opts = append(opts, client.WithHTTPClient(&http.Client{Transport: tr, Timeout: time.Duration(cfg.HTTPClientTimeout)}))
181: 	}
182: 
183: 	return opts, nil
184: }
185: 
186: func getPort(container dockerData, serverPort string) string {
187: 	if len(serverPort) > 0 {
188: 		return serverPort
189: 	}
190: 
191: 	var ports []nat.Port
192: 	for port := range container.NetworkSettings.Ports {
193: 		ports = append(ports, port)
194: 	}
195: 
196: 	less := func(i, j nat.Port) bool {
197: 		return i.Int() < j.Int()
198: 	}
199: 	nat.Sort(ports, less)
200:

319: 
320: func (p *DynConfBuilder) getIPAddress(ctx context.Context, container dockerData) string {
321: 	logger := log.Ctx(ctx)
322: 
323: 	netNotFound := false
324: 	if container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network != "" {
325: 		settings := container.NetworkSettings
326: 		if settings.Networks != nil {
327: 			network := settings.Networks[container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network]
328: 			if network != nil {
329: 				return network.Addr
330: 			}
331: 
332: 			netNotFound = true
333: 			logger.Warn().Msgf("Could not find network named %q for container %q. Maybe you're missing the project's prefix in the label?", container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network, container.Name)
334: 		}
335: 	}
336: 
337: 	if container.NetworkSettings.NetworkMode.IsHost() {
338: 		if container.Node != nil && container.Node.IPAddress != "" {
339: 			return container.Node.IPAddress
340: 		}
341: 		if host, err := net.LookupHost("host.docker.internal"); err == nil {
342: 			return host[0]
343: 		}
344: 		if host, err := net.LookupHost("host.containers.internal"); err == nil {
345: 			return host[0]
346: 		}
347: 		return "127.0.0.1"
348: 	}
349: 
350: 	if container.NetworkSettings.NetworkMode.IsContainer() {
351: 		connectedContainer := container.NetworkSettings.NetworkMode.ConnectedContainer()
352: 		containerInspected, err := p.apiClient.ContainerInspect(context.Background(), connectedContainer)
353: 		if err != nil {
354: 			logger.Warn().Err(err).Msgf("Unable to get IP address for container %s: failed to inspect container ID %s", container.Name, connectedContainer)
355: 			return ""
356: 		}
357: 
358: 		// Check connected container for traefik.docker.network,
359: 		// falling back to the network specified on the current container.
360: 		containerParsed := parseContainer(containerInspected)
361: 		extraConf, err := p.extractLabels(containerParsed)
362: 		if err != nil {
363: 			logger.Warn().Err(err).Msgf("Unable to get IP address for container %s : failed to get extra configuration for container %s", container.Name, containerInspected.Name)
364: 			return ""
365: 		}
366: 
367: 		if extraConf.Docker.Network == "" {
368: 			extraConf.Docker.Network = container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network
369: 		}
370: 
371: 		containerParsed.ExtraConf = extraConf
372: 		return p.getIPAddress(ctx, containerParsed)
373: 	}
374: 
375: 	for _, network := range container.NetworkSettings.Networks {
376: 		if netNotFound {
377: 			logger.Warn().Msgf("Defaulting to first available network (%q) for container %q.", network, container.Name)
378: 		}
379: 		return network.Addr
380: 	}
381: 
382: 	logger.Warn().Msg("Unable to find the IP address.")
383: 	return ""
384: }
385: 
386: func (p *DynConfBuilder) getPortBinding(container dockerData, serverPort string) (*nat.PortBinding, error) {
387: 	port := getPort(container, serverPort)
388: 
389: 	for netPort, portBindings := range container.NetworkSettings.Ports {
390: 		if strings.EqualFold(string(netPort), port+"/TCP") || strings.EqualFold(string(netPort), port+"/UDP") {
391: 			for _, p := range portBindings {
392: 				return &p, nil
393: 			}
394: 		}
395: 	}
396: 
397: 	return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to find the external IP:Port for the container %q", container.Name)
398: }
